records.question: Which players named Don were born in Baton Rouge and attended high school in LA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.birthcity = 'Baton Rouge' AND players.usefirst = 'Don' AND players.hsstate = 'LA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT playerID
FROM players
WHERE firstName = 'Don' 
  AND birthCity = 'Baton Rouge'
  AND hsState = 'LA'

records.question: Who are the players born in Brooklyn, with both their birth country and high school country as USA, who attended Providence and had exactly 3 free throw attempts, 6 assists, and played 16 minutes in the All-Star game?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.hscountry = 'USA' AND players.birthcity = 'Brooklyn' AND player_allstar.ft_attempted = 3.0 AND player_allstar.assists = 6.0 AND player_allstar.minutes = 16 AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.college = 'Providence'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
JOIN player_allstar pa ON p.playerID = pa.playerID
WHERE p.birthCity = 'Brooklyn'
  AND p.birthCountry = 'USA'
  AND p.hsCountry = 'USA'
  AND p.college = 'Providence'
  AND pa.ft_attempted = 3
  AND pa.assists = 6
  AND pa.minutes = 16

records.question: Who are the players born on or before 1947-04-16 with awards from 1976 or later, who played at most 1 all-star game making no more than 5 free throws and attempting no more than 17 field goals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE awards_players.year >= 1976 AND player_allstar.ft_made <= 5.0 AND player_allstar.fg_attempted <= 17.0 AND players.birthdate <= '1947-04-16' AND player_allstar.games_played <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
JOIN awards_players ap ON p.playerID = ap.playerID
LEFT JOIN player_allstar pa ON p.playerID = pa.playerID
WHERE p.birthDate <= '1947-04-16'
  AND ap.year >= 1976
GROUP BY p.playerID
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pa.season_id) <= 1
  AND (SUM(pa.ft_made) <= 5 OR SUM(pa.ft_made) IS NULL)
  AND (SUM(pa.fg_attempted) <= 17 OR SUM(pa.fg_attempted) IS NULL)

records.question: Who are the guards born in CA that have played in the NBA and averaged at least 1.0 assist in All-Star games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE awards_players.lgid = 'NBA' AND player_allstar.assists >= 1.0 AND players.pos = 'G' AND players.birthstate = 'CA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.playerID
FROM players p
JOIN player_allstar pa ON p.playerID = pa.playerID
WHERE p.pos LIKE '%G%'
  AND p.birthState = 'CA'
  AND pa.league_id = 'NBA'
GROUP BY p.playerID
HAVING AVG(CAST(pa.assists AS REAL) / NULLIF(pa.games_played, 0)) >= 1.0
